articles.title: At Computex, Dell’s $700 XPS 13 Sets Its Sights on the MacBook Neo - PCMag
articles.description: To compete with Apple's MacBook Neo and other 'cheapium' budget laptops, Dell transforms its high-end 13-inch XPS 13 into an entry-level system for $699.99. It's pricier, but Dell's laptop has some key edges over the Neo that justify the extra cost.
